summary: A small Nordic NATO member transformed by North Sea oil into one of the world's wealthiest per-capita nations, managing the world's largest sovereign wealth fund ($1.7T) for future generations.

history.detail: Norse raids and exploration across Europe, Atlantic, reaching North America.
Norway joins Scandinavian union under Danish then Swedish crown.
Peaceful dissolution of union; Haakon VII becomes king.
Germany invades; king and government flee to London.
Ekofisk field found; transforms nation's economy.
Government Pension Fund Global created to save oil wealth for future.

finance.currency_role: NOK; oil-backed but managed to avoid Dutch Disease
leverage_tools: $1.7T sovereign wealth fund (owns ~1.5% of ALL listed global equities)

resources.oil_gas: Major North Sea producer; pipeline to UK and Germany
resources.water: Massive hydroelectric capacity; nearly 100% renewable electricity
resources.agriculture: Salmon aquaculture — world's largest farmed salmon exporter

follow_the_money.detail: $1.7T fund owns stakes in 9,000+ companies globally; ethical investment guidelines
Replaced Russian gas as Europe's top supplier post-2022

connections.detail: North Sea oil and gas pipeline exports
NATO ally; US forces in Norway increased post-2022
